---
title: "notes"
editor: visual
---

### Country Data Comparison (Pending Inputs) {#sec-ba-country-reports}

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| label: country-comparison
#| code-summary: "Compare with UNFCCC country reports — Honduras"

# Ensure full MCD64A1 collection is loaded (not a pre-filtered subset)
mcd64_full <- ee$ImageCollection("MODIS/061/MCD64A1")

years <- 2001:2023
geom  <- aoi_country_ee$geometry()

getAnnualBA <- function(yr) {
  annual <- mcd64_full$
    filter(ee$Filter$calendarRange(yr, yr, "year"))$
    filterBounds(geom)$
    map(faostat_filter)$
    select("BurnDate")$max()$gt(0L)$selfMask()
  
  area_result <- annual$
    multiply(ee$Image$pixelArea()$divide(10000))$
    reduceRegion(
      reducer    = ee$Reducer$sum(),
      geometry   = geom,
      scale      = 500L,
      maxPixels  = 1e9,
      bestEffort = TRUE
    )$getInfo()
  
  val <- area_result[["BurnDate"]]
  data.frame(
    year           = yr,
    burned_area_ha = if (is.null(val)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(val)
  )
}

# Pull year-by-year — avoids building a massive FeatureCollection server-side
modis_ba <- do.call(rbind, lapply(years, function(yr) {
  tryCatch(
    getAnnualBA(yr),
    error = function(e) {
      message("Year ", yr, " failed: ", e$message)
      data.frame(year = yr, burned_area_ha = NA_real_)
    }
  )
}))

# Example: Load burned area data
country_reported <- data.frame(
  year           = c(2010, 2015, 2020),
  reported_ba_ha = c(25000, 18000, 32000),  
  source         = "Honduras NIR"
)

comparison <- merge(country_reported, modis_ba, by = "year")
comparison$difference_ha <- comparison$reported_ba_ha - comparison$burned_area_ha
comparison$percent_diff  <- (comparison$difference_ha / comparison$reported_ba_ha) * 100

ggplot(comparison, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = reported_ba_ha, color = "Country Reported"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = burned_area_ha, color = "MODIS MCD64A1"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = reported_ba_ha, color = "Country Reported"), size = 3) +
  geom_point(aes(y = burned_area_ha, color = "MODIS MCD64A1"), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Country Reported" = "blue", "MODIS MCD64A1" = "red")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Burned Area: Country Reports vs MODIS MCD64A1",
    subtitle = "Honduras",
    x = "Year", y = "Burned Area (hectares)", color = "Source"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

cor_test <- cor.test(comparison$reported_ba_ha, comparison$burned_area_ha)
cat("Correlation:", round(cor_test$estimate, 3), "\n")
cat("P-value:", cor_test$p.value, "\n")
```
